statement_html:
Simplifier l'expression :
\(\frac{0\cdot 3+randint(1..3-1)\cdot x^wims(sort numeric list item(1..3,6))[randint(2,3)]+2\cdot 3+randint(1..3-1)\cdot x^wims(sort numeric list item(1..3,6))[5-randint(2,3)]}{texmath(maxima(3*x^wims(sort numeric list item(1..3))})

answers.expected: (maxima(0*3+randint(1..3-1)*x^(wims(sort numeric list item(1..3,6))[randint(2,3)]-wims(sort numeric list item(1..3)+2*3+randint(1..3-1)*x^(wims(sort numeric list item(1..3,6))[5-randint(2,3)]-wims(sort numeric list item(1..3)))/3
